description: Wrapping nearly every value and callback in useMemo/useCallback, adding overhead and masking stale-dependency bugs without a measured win.
body: Failure mode: memoization is applied as a blanket default, so the app pays comparison/allocation cost on every render and incorrect dependency arrays silently freeze stale values. Detection signals: useMemo/useCallback around trivial values; dependency lint disabled; no profiler evidence of a prior hotspot; stale data after props change. Do not memoize without a measured render cost or identity requirement. Safer fallback: remove speculative memoization, profile to find the real hotspot, memoize only that path with an exhaustive dependency array, and confirm via a render trace.
